# SecKey

**Class**

An object that represents a cryptographic key.

## Declaration

```swift
class SecKey
```

## Overview

A [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKey] instance that represents a key that is stored in a keychain can be safely cast to a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem] for manipulation as a keychain item. On the other hand, if the key is not stored in a keychain, casting the object to a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem] and passing it to Keychain Services functions returns errors.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
